svg.aria-label: Sheet Music for "The Humours of Tulla"
svg.style: display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px;
svg.title: Sheet Music for "The Humours of Tulla"

text.tspan: D D/Em D G/A7 | D D/G D G/A7
D D/Em D G/A7 | D D/G D G/A7
Source: Adapted from versions at https://thesession.org/tunes/141
Notes: A fun tune I was shown in Durham! First comes the basic melody, then my variations.
The G and Em chords are fairly interchangeable. I mix and match them in this arrangement.
The ~ signs mark Irish rolls, meaning you need to do something like bow triplets to make it more
interesting. Or fiddle through it, like I have in the second half of the B-part.
